message:
fix(h1,tls): improve HTTP/1.1 client resilience and add TLS stream guards

HTTP/1.1 client (src/http/h1/client.rs): harden the response parsing
pipeline to handle edge cases in chunked transfer encoding and
connection reuse — fixes a regression where certain servers' responses
could be truncated when the framed write buffer wasn't fully consumed
before reading the next response.

TLS stream (src/tls/stream.rs): add defensive checks around the TLS
handshake completion state to prevent reads on partially-established
connections, improving reliability for servers that are slow to complete
the TLS negotiation.

New regression test (tests/http_h1_client_regression.rs): reproduces
the specific H1 client truncation scenario to prevent future regressions
in the chunked response parsing path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
